title: ODCommand
description: Schema for *OD commands. Enforces *OD prefix, proper argument syntax, no comma-separated lists where spaces are required, and valid transitions only.

command.description: The command string. Must start with '*OD'.

arguments.description: Arguments object. Each value must be a string. Space-separated lists are required; comma-separated where space-separated is required will fail validation.

transition.description: Valid transition identifier for the command state machine.
